revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to joint biography |name=To a joint biography |from=one person's name |to=a biographical article that includes this person along with one or more other persons |info=** Be sure to include {{code|<nowiki>{{DEFAULTSORT:(surname), (given name)}}</nowiki>}} for correct [[WP:SORTKEY|category sorting]] of this person's name. |main category=Redirects to joint biographies }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
